name: IdsDmClmDmClmLnAltChrgExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_base AS (SELECT COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') SRC_SYS_CD, ALTCHRG.CLM_ID, ALTCHRG.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, REMIT.REMIT_PATN_RESP_AMT, REMIT.REMIT_MBR_OTHR_LIAB_AMT, REMIT.REMIT_NO_RESP_AMT, ALTCHRG.REMIT_PROV_WRT_OFF_AMT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_WEBDM_ETL_DRVR EXTR JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM_LN_ALT_CHRG_REMIT ALTCHRG ON EXTR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = ALTCHRG.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND EXTR.CLM_ID = ALTCHRG.CLM_ID JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM_LN_REMIT REMIT ON ALTCHRG.CLM_ID = REMIT.CLM_ID AND ALTCHRG.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = REMIT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND ALTCHRG.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO = REMIT.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON ALTCHRG.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=CD.CD_MPPNG_SK ), cte_final AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, CLM_ID, CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, REMIT_PATN_RESP_AMT AS CLM_LN_REMIT_PATN_RESP_AMT, REMIT_PROV_WRT_OFF_AMT AS CLM_LN_REMIT_PROV_WRT_OFF_AMT, REMIT_MBR_OTHR_LIAB_AMT AS CLM_LN_REMIT_MBR_OTHR_LIAB_AMT, REMIT_NO_RESP_AMT AS CLM_LN_REMIT_NO_RESP_AMT, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO FROM cte_base ) SELECT * FROM cte_final
